---
title: "Иллюстрации к докладу ЮМП"
description: "Иллюстрации к докладу ЮМП"
categories: [formal]
---

So i've found 5 points where it manifest:

1\. left/right metadichotomy  
2\. left/right ITR cosets  
3\. left/right formula direction  
4\. calculating the result of multiplication for left or right multiplier (conjecture)  
5\. unbraiding of socion when rearranging in Minaevs by switching asymetrical ITR
